title: senecio fayei
intro: Senecio fayei, also known as Fay's ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Senecio fayei can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its herbal uses, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
